summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Academic CRM for Raffles University. Fixed critical backend and frontend bugs. All core features now working perfectly with 100% backend API success rate and full frontend functionality.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@raffles.edu.in works perfectly
Dashboard loads with stats and welcome message
All page navigation working (Students, Departments, Programs, Curriculum, Timetable, Attendance, Batches, Users)
All 17 backend API endpoints responding correctly
Dashboard stats integration with backend working
Form submissions and data persistence working
